resolution.value: Case solved by police team led by Captain Wallace with forensic support
resolution.quote: Thanks to all of you, Carol for a great job as lead investigator, Frank, dependable as usual, Tom good job

investigator.value: Captain Robert Wallace, police officer and former Director of Training
investigator.quote: Good evening Captain. Your party is in the private dining room, just as you requested

social_world.value: Law enforcement hierarchy and professional class distinctions between investigators and working-class spouses
social_world.quote: You use the word, profession. Right a way we have a difference. Qwen will have a profession. You will have a job.

media_and_audience.value: Police work creates public visibility and newspaper coverage that affects personal relationships
media_and_audience.quote: She'll have her photograph and name in newspapers while you're placing bottles of milk on back porches.

investigator_wound.value: Recent divorce and personal isolation affecting the protagonist's emotional state
investigator_wound.quote: They were the divorce papers ending the marriage of one, Robert Wallace to one, Mary Wagner.

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton rip tide
